heading: Boolarra vs Boolarra South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boolarra, Victoria and Boolarra South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boolarra South has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Boolarra (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boolarra or Boolarra South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boolarra has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Boolarra South scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boolarra scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Boolarra South scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boolarra or Boolarra South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boolarra South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
